visual_description:
A low-angle, close-up shot focuses on a dark, weathered wooden floor in a dimly lit space. In the center of the frame, a small pile of what appears to be white, lumpy objects rests on the planks. The background is shrouded in darkness, with a faint, indistinct shape visible in the distance. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score. A deep, resonant, and slightly dissonant note creates a feeling of unease and anticipation, as if something is about to unfold in a dark and mysterious way.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of a group of young people standing in a line on a wooden walkway. A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a grey zip-up hoodie and dark pants, stands at the front and center, looking forward with a determined expression. Behind her, several other teenagers, dressed in dark, school-like uniforms, stand in a line, looking ahead with concerned and slightly fearful expressions. The setting is a long, dark corridor with high, arched ceilings and intricate wooden architecture, suggesting a castle or an old institution. The lighting is low
